project.name: hello-world-brownfield
project.description: Test PRD for GAP-P9 Stage 1: verifies brownfield context ingestion against an existing TypeScript repo.

stories.title: Add farewell function to greet module
stories.description: Extend the existing greet.ts module with a farewell(name) function that returns 'Goodbye, <name>!'. Add a corresponding test in greet.test.ts. The existing greet() function must remain unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: greet.test.ts includes a test for farewell()

stories.title: Add name list to config file
stories.description: Extract the hardcoded names array from main.ts into a names.config.json file. main.ts should read the config at runtime. Keeps main.ts clean and makes the name list configurable without code changes.
acceptanceCriteria: names.config.json created with the names array
Running main.ts produces identical output to current
